# unifi_sites (Data Source)

All local UniFi sites. Use it to resolve a site's UUID or its legacy internal reference name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all local UniFi sites, e.g. to resolve a site's UUID from its display name.
data "unifi_sites" "all" {}

output "site_ids" {
  value = { for s in data.unifi_sites.all.sites : s.name => s.id }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `sites` (Attributes List) The local sites. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sites))

<a id="nestedatt--sites"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sites`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Official-API site UUID.
- `internal_reference` (String) Legacy site name used by the Internal API.
- `name` (String) Site display name.
